data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Provider performance comparison', but the evidence provided does not include a direct comparison of provider performance metrics. While the linked use case mentions completion rates for two providers (Dr. Smith at 95% and Dr. Lee at 82%), it lacks a comprehensive analysis or comparison that would fulfill the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the necessary comparative analysis of provider performance.
gaps: No comprehensive comparison of provider performance metrics provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
